body: {"reply": "This week's movie releases include Masood Khan Part-1: The Rage, a comedy, family, and fantasy film, and Peddi, an action thriller. There are also some upcoming movies like Chand Mera Dil, The Sheep Detectives, Jawaak, and Gabru, as well as Mortal Kombat II and Slumdog \u2013 33 Temple Road, which are all set to release soon.", "mood": "neutral", "status": "ok"}
